creator: jason@tubnor.net
text:
I can confirm that the latest ISO I have pulled from Microsoft (21H1) installs fine with similar configuration.  This is on a Lenovo T450 laptop:

loader="uefi"
graphics="yes"
cpu=2
memory=4G
disk0_type="ahci-hd"
disk0_name="windows10.img"
disk0_dev="image"
graphics_port="5901"
graphics_res="1024x768"
xhci_mouse="yes"
utctime="no"
virt_random="yes"

hw.model: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-5200U CPU @ 2.20GHz

Can you download and try the following Windows 10 Image:

SHA512 (Windows10-21H1.iso) = d7d1276929bac32b5fc266f4bdb7f3c321f1d1fcb023a61d07d0b248ede488689060c7585a68c61528e1f6f79f4373ccde1e22daa459fea13db054dd424ee87b

https://mirror.ar18.org/pub/Microsoft/Windows10-21H1.iso
